title: Deere: Why I'm So Very Bullish Despite Challenges
text: In this article, I break down the biggest tailwind for Deere, which is strong demand and its ability to grow its market share. The biggest headwinds are supply chain and inflation-related problems, which caused the company to miss 3Q22 earnings estimates.

title: Deere & Company (DE) Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Deere & Company (NYSE:DE ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call August 19, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Brent Norwood - Head, IR Cory Reed - President, Worldwide Production and Precision Ag Raj Kalathur - CFO and President, John Deere Financial Josh Jepsen - Deputy Financial Officer Rachel Bach - Manager, Investor Communications Conference Call Participants Tim Thein - Citigroup Tami Zakaria - JPMorgan Kristen Owen - Oppenheimer Jamie Cook - Credit Suisse Dillon Cumming - Morgan Stanley Seth Weber - Wells Fargo Securities Rob Wertheimer - Melius Research Jerry Revich - Goldman Sachs David Raso - Evercore ISI Steven Fisher - UBS Stephen Volkmann - Jefferies Chad Dillard - Bernstein Michael Feniger - Bank of America John Joyner - BMO Operator Good morning, and welcome to Deere & Company Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call. Your lines have been placed on a listen-only mode until the question-and-answer session of today's conference.

title: Deere (DE) Earnings Miss, Sales Beat Estimates in Q2, Up Y/Y
text: Deere (DE) projects net income between $7.0 billion and $7.2 billion for fiscal 2022.

title: Late Summer Period of Reflection; FL Beats, DE Mixed

title: Deere stock pressured after ‘noisy' quarter
text: Shares of Deere & Co. moved into the red Friday after the farm and construction equipment maker's third-quarter profit missed Wall Street's target on higher costs and production inefficiencies, while it posted stronger-than-expected revenue.

title: Deere (DE) Q3 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Deere (DE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -7.23% and 0.76%, respectively, for the quarter ended July 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Deere Reports Third Quarter Net Income of $1.884 Billion
text: Third-quarter net sales rise 25%, bolstered by higher rates of production, despite continuing supply-chain pressures. Full-year earnings outlook revised to range of $7.0 – $7.2 billion.

title: Deere stock drops after profit miss and trimmed net income outlook, while revenue rises well above forecasts
text: Shares of Deere & Co. DE, +0.90% dropped 6.8% in premarket trading Friday, after the agriculture, construction and turf care equipment maker reported fiscal third-quarter profit that missed expectations, amid higher costs and production inefficiencies, but revenue that was well above forecasts. Net income for the quarter to July 31 rose to $1.88 billion, or $6.16 a share, from $1.67 billion, or $5.32 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Deere quarterly profit rises on strong equipment demand, pricing
text: Deere & Co reported a rise in quarterly profit on Friday as higher equipment demand coupled with a robust pricing environment helped the world's largest farm equipment maker to offset inflationary cost pressures.

title: Deere's sales expected to rise on increased demand
text: Deere & Co is expected to report double-digit sales growth in its Friday results, fueled by strong equipment demand from farmers flush with cash that has helped the company raise pricing.

title: Deere & Company Q3 Preview: Can the Earnings Streak Continue?
text: John Deere has been on a remarkable earnings streak, exceeding the Zacks Consensus EPS Estimate in each of its previous 11 quarters.

title: Will Deere (DE) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Deere (DE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Deere (DE) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Deere's (DE) Q3 performance will likely reflect increased farm equipment demand on higher crop prices and benefits from a margin-improvement plan.

text: Jim Cramer reviewed this week's slate of scheduled earnings from retail giants on Monday's episode of "Mad Money."

title: 2 Farm Equipment and Heavy Machinery Stocks for the GARP Investor
text: There are some investors who believe growth is important, but do not want to pay too much for it. As a result, they are looking for stocks in which growth and value work together, laying a strong foundation for an investment they hope will be successful.

title: John Deere invests in Hello Tractor
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) has made a minority investment in Hello Tractor, an ag-tech company based in Nairobi, Kenya.

title: Felecia Pryor Joins Deere & Company as Senior Vice President & Chief People Officer
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) announced today that former BorgWarner and Ford Motor Company executive, Felecia Pryor will join its senior leadership team as Senior Vice President and Chief People Officer effective August 15.

title: 3 Cheap Cathie Wood Stocks to Buy Now
text: It's hard finding the best stock pickers, especially in a year like 2022. We all know that past performance doesn't mean future success, which means someone who has succeeded or failed in the past will continue to do that now.
